title: Sun Salutation (Surya Namaskar)
description: A dynamic sequence of 12 poses to warm up the body and synchronize breath with movement.

title: Restorative Flow for Anxiety
description: Gentle poses like Child's Pose and Legs-up-the-Wall to calm the nervous system.

title: Deep Sleep Sequence
description: Slow, grounding poses designed to prepare the mind and body for restful sleep.

title: Power Yoga for Focus
description: Intense poses like Warrior III and Crow Pose to build strength and mental clarity.

title: Lower Back Relief
description: Targeted stretches like Cat-Cow and Sphinx pose to alleviate tension in the lower spine.
